notes: Build under Opportunities → Pipelines → Create New. Each stage below fires its own lightweight workflow triggered on 'Opportunity Stage Changed' with stage filter.

stages.name: New Buyer — Intake
stages.trigger_event: Contact created with tag buyer:new OR form submission

stages.name: Intake Call Scheduled
stages.fires_workflow: Send calendar booking link (inline in WF01)

stages.name: Intake Call Complete
stages.trigger_event: Rep manually moves stage after call

stages.name: Under Negotiation
stages.trigger_event: Buyer replies interested or clicks deal link
stages.fires_workflow: Notify acquisitions rep, start underwriting checklist

stages.name: Offer Submitted
stages.trigger_event: Rep moves stage after offer sent
stages.fires_workflow: Send offer confirmation email to buyer

stages.name: Assigned
stages.trigger_event: DocuSign/PandaDoc webhook on completion (deal assigned to end buyer)
stages.fires_workflow: Confirm EMD deposit + title open; notify rep

stages.name: Dormant
stages.fires_workflow: None — parking stage; manual re-engagement moves back to Active
